title: ForeverLoveSword(永爱之刃)
body:
This mod does not have a composition table, and the weapons inside are very excessive and not suitable for generation and use
这个Mod没有合成表，里面的武器很超标，不适合生存使用
This Mod is an artifact mod
这个Mod是一个神器mod
The weapon inside is very high damage, can kill almost any creature
里面的武器伤害非常高，可以击杀几乎所有生物
This weapon also has a disarming weapon, which, as the name suggests, once in your hands you can't throw away
这把武器还有防缴械，顾名思义一旦拿到手上就扔不掉
Weapons, cool fonts, right buttons, cool colored lightning
武器还有炫酷的字体，右键帅气的彩色闪电
